assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 37-45 contain a 'Deployment Context Lookup' section that shows the Source Repositories table with a Deployment Context column. The table explicitly lists rhtpa-backend with Deployment Context 'customer-shipped'. Line 45 states: 'Deployment context for rhtpa-backend: **customer-shipped**'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md (titled 'Step 1 -- Data Extraction') contains the 'Deployment Context Lookup' section (lines 37-47) which maps the affected component to rhtpa-backend and records customer-shipped. Line 46 explicitly states: 'This deployment context will be used in Step 8 (Remediation) to generate coordination guidance requiring coordination with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.' The deployment context is recorded as part of the Step 1 data extraction output alongside the Parsed CVE Data table.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 has '## Implementation Notes' (line 51) followed by '### Coordination Guidance' subsection (line 60) containing: 'This component is shipped to customers.' Task 2 has '## Implementation Notes' (line 113) followed by '### Coordination Guidance' subsection (line 117) with the same customer-shipped guidance. Both tasks have Coordination Guidance as a subsection within Implementation Notes.

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: Both remediation tasks contain identical guidance text at lines 62 and 119: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' This explicitly mentions all three required elements: CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.
